title: astragalus angustus
intro: Astragalus angustus is a type of plant species in the legume family, specifically belonging to the genus Astragalus, commonly known as milkvetch. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects, as well as its ability to enhance adaptability to stress. The health benefits of Astragalus angustus include reducing fatigue, improving respiratory function, and supporting the overall well-being of individuals. Astragalus angustus can be prepared as an herbal supplement, often in the form of capsules or tinctures, or used in teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
